stories.title: Ava Kuszak Walk-Off HR — Nebraska Survives Arkansas 5-3 in 10 Innings (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Ava Kuszak. Walk-off. 10th inning. Two-run homer.

Nebraska 5, Arkansas 3.

Jordy Frahm threw 133 pitches. They still found a way. Huskers advance to the winners' bracket. 🥎

#Huskers #WCWS #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Nebraska's WCWS opener was supposed to be comfortable. It was 10 innings and 133 Frahm pitches.

Ava Kuszak ended it with a walk-off HR in the 10th.

Nebraska 5, Arkansas 3.

Huskers face Alabama tonight — 7 PM ET on ESPN. 🥎

#Huskers #WCWS #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Ava Kuszak Walk-Off HR: Nebraska Survives Arkansas 5-3 in 10 Innings at the WCWS

stories.title: Tennessee Freshman Elsa Morrison Three-Run HR Stuns Defending Champion Texas 6-3 (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Tennessee had unfinished business with Texas after last year's WCWS semifinal loss.

A freshman finished it.

Elsa Morrison: 2-for-3, three-run HR in the 2nd inning, 3 RBIs.

Tennessee 6, Texas 3. Lady Vols advance. 🥎

#VolsSoftball #WCWS #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Elsa Morrison walked into the 2026 WCWS as a freshman.

She walked out of Game 2 as Tennessee's hero.

Three-run homer. 3 RBIs. 6-3 win over the defending national champion.

Lady Vols face Texas Tech today at 3 PM ET on ABC. 🥎

#VolsSoftball #WCWS

article.headline: Freshman Elsa Morrison Three-Run HR: Tennessee Stuns Defending Champion Texas 6-3 at WCWS

stories.title: NiJaree Canady Dominates — Texas Tech Run-Rules Mississippi State 8-0 in 5 Innings (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady: 4 innings, 2 hits, 0 runs, 3 strikeouts.

Jackie Lis: two-run HR in the first inning.

Texas Tech 8, Mississippi State 0. Run rule. Five innings.

The WCWS debut the moment deserved. 🥎

#WreckEm #WCWS #NCAASoftball

stories.title: Brooke Wells' 24th HR Rallies Alabama Past UCLA 6-3 (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Alabama trailed 3-1. Megan Grant hit HR No. 41 — extending her own all-time NCAA record.

Then Brooke Wells answered. Three-run homer. No. 24.

Alabama 6, UCLA 3. Wells + Pupillo: first Alabama duo to both hit 20+ HRs in one season. 🥎

#RollTide #WCWS #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Brooke Wells' 24th HR Fuels Alabama's Comeback Over UCLA 6-3 at the 2026 WCWS

stories.title: WCWS Elimination Night — Texas and Arkansas Face Must-Win Games (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Two must-win games at WCWS tonight:

Texas vs. Mississippi State — 7 PM ET, ESPN2
Defending champions. Win or go home.

UCLA vs. Arkansas — 9:30 PM ET, ESPN2
Megan Grant (41 HRs). Season on the line.

Losers' bracket waits for no one. 🥎

#WCWS #NCAASoftball
